2026-04-24T21:16:46.6801395Z ##[group]Run # Fix permissions on firewall logs so they can be uploaded as artifacts
2026-04-24T21:16:46.6801667Z [36;1m# Fix permissions on firewall logs so they can be uploaded as artifacts[0m
2026-04-24T21:16:46.6801809Z [36;1m# AWF runs with sudo, creating files owned by root[0m
2026-04-24T21:16:46.6802022Z [36;1msudo chmod -R a+r /tmp/gh-aw/sandbox/firewall/logs 2>/dev/null || true[0m
2026-04-24T21:16:46.6802358Z [36;1m# Only run awf logs summary if awf command exists (it may not be installed if workflow failed before install step)[0m
2026-04-24T21:16:46.6802480Z [36;1mif command -v awf &> /dev/null; then[0m
2026-04-24T21:16:46.6802622Z [36;1m  awf logs summary | tee -a "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"[0m
2026-04-24T21:16:46.6802841Z [36;1melse[0m
2026-04-24T21:16:46.6803028Z [36;1m  echo 'AWF binary not installed, skipping firewall log summary'[0m
2026-04-24T21:16:46.6803103Z [36;1mfi[0m
